brand.notes: #B1954A (dark gold/bronze, 12 hits) is the dominant brand color. #C5A95E (lighter gold, 7 hits) is a secondary variant. Both confirmed as brand accent via Osano consent-dialog CSS vars which use brand colors. Dark background #141414 (16 hits). ROG uses gold on black as their national brand identity; this franchise affiliate uses same palette. DBPR licensee: ROG MVP COLLIER COUNTY LLC.
